opportunities.entry_trigger: Stagger entries 69k-72k on dips; daily closes must remain above 65k and macro risk-off must not accelerate.
opportunities.rationale: BTC outperformed all major risk assets last week (+6%) despite S&P -1.6%, with $767M in spot ETF inflows and Strategy's $776M BTC purchase. Institutional accumulation is decisive. Coinbase premium turned positive signalling US-led demand. Bear flag risk above $73-75K is the key technical warning to watch; stay disciplined at 65K stop.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter near 2000-2150 if BTC holds above 67k; invalidated on a 4H close below 1900.
opportunities.rationale: BlackRock launched a staked Ethereum ETF on Nasdaq on March 14, providing a new institutional narrative tailwind. ETH is underperforming BTC YTD but the staking yield product is a structural accumulation catalyst. RSI recovering from oversold. Bull pivot at $2,150 is the key reclaim level; entry sized small given macro headwinds.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter only if BTC holds above 69k and SOL reclaims the 20-day EMA above 92.
opportunities.rationale: Solana is a high-beta L1 in a risk-off macro environment; conviction is LOW. CME now offers SOL futures and options, increasing institutional access. Developer activity remains strong. The $110-180 range is the medium-term consolidation zone with upside to $180 if BTC confirms above $73K. Size at 1% and exit fast if BTC shows bear flag breakdown.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter near 20-day EMA ($1.35-$1.48) on a bounce with BTC stable above 67k.
opportunities.rationale: XRP is consolidating in the $1.20-$2.00 channel after the SEC case resolution. Bulls are buying on 20-day EMA dips; a break above the channel resistance ~$2.00 could trigger a run to $3 then $3.40. Risk is low given pending US crypto regulatory framework, which is positive for Ripple. Conviction is low in high-vol macro; size at 1% only.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Accumulate on dips toward $12.50-$13.50 if BTC holds above 67k.

Multiple new enterprise integrations in 2026. The DeFi ecosystem rebound in 2026 should benefit LINK directly as TVL recovers. Analysts project LINK to new highs in 2026 on surging oracle demand. Sized conservatively at 1% given macro beta.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on a confirmed hold above $16 with improving RSI and BTC above 68k.

Current RSI at 37 is approaching oversold; Bollinger upper band at $12-15 provides a roadmap to $27 in a bull-case recovery. LOW conviction in current risk-off regime; size at 1%, stop at $13 (Bollinger lower band support).

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on a daily close above $600 with BTC holding 68k.

Path of least resistance is to the upside above $644 with a target at $686; $745 if BTC confirms new highs. Risk: any new regulatory action against Binance in key jurisdictions.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter near $3.60-4.10 on dip to support; Telegram's 950M user base is the core adoption catalyst.
opportunities.rationale: TON has emerged as a standout altcoin in March 2026 driven by Telegram's massive user base and in-app crypto payments integration. The Telegram mini-app ecosystem creates unique mass-adoption flywheel. TON transaction volumes are growing 40%+ MoM. Risk is the concentration of the Telegram founder and regulatory scrutiny on Telegram in several jurisdictions.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter only on a confirmed hold above $0.65 with BTC stable above 68k.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter on pullback to $2.00-2.20 support; exit on weekly close below $1.80.
